g.text: Operators access Pulsar via web, mobile, or
desktop to browse reports, content drafts,
Single entry point for operator browsing. Dashboard, reports, article
feed, graph explorer, content drafts review. On-demand PDF via
Long-running processes that own data collection. Postgres advisory
locks keep live scrape and backfill from blocking each other.

svg.text: Dedicated storage and config per concern: Postgres for content and reports, Neo4j for the graph, .context plus .voice for operator identity.
